section_data.summaryData: The code defines a function to convert a date string into its corresponding month abbreviation and transforms stock data into an array of objects with date and closing price properties, which is then used to render a responsive line chart displaying stock prices over time.

data.summary: The code defines a function to convert a date string into its corresponding month abbreviation and transforms stock data into an array of objects with date and closing price properties, which is then used to render a responsive line chart displaying stock prices over time.
This line adds a horizontal X-axis to the chart, using the "date" property from each data point to label the axis values.

data.summary: This code defines an Express route handler for GET requests to /api/stock/:symbol, which responds with either mock or real historical daily stock data (including date, close price, and volume) for the specified symbol, handling errors and formatting the response with ticker and company name.

data.instruction: Modify to Get the current stock price for the selected stock instead of historical daily stock data

metadata.originalCode:
<LineChart
          data={chartData}
          margin={{ top: 10, right: 30, left: 0, bottom: 0 }}
        >
          <XAxis dataKey="date" tickFormatter={formatDateString} />{" "}
          <YAxis domain={["auto", "auto"]} />
          <Tooltip />
          <Legend />
          <Line type="monotone" dataKey="price" stroke="#8884d8" dot={false} />
        </LineChart>

section_data.summaryData: This code renders a Recharts LineChart component that visualizes stock price data over time, featuring a formatted X-axis for dates, an automatically scaled Y-axis, interactive tooltips, a legend, and a smooth monotone line representing price without data point markers.
section_data.title: Untitled

data.summary: This code renders a Recharts LineChart that visualizes stock price data over time, featuring a formatted X-axis for dates, an automatically scaled Y-axis, interactive tooltips, a legend, and a styled monotone line representing the price without data point markers.
data.selected_code:
<LineChart
          data={chartData}
          margin={{ top: 10, right: 30, left: 0, bottom: 0 }}
        >
          <XAxis dataKey="date" tickFormatter={formatDateString} />{" "}

data.instruction: also create a ReferenceLine for it (i.e., a horizontal dashed red line across the chart  and the y axis should be at the position of latest stock price

data.updated_code:
<LineChart
          data={chartData}
          margin={{ top: 10, right: 30, left: 0, bottom: 0 }}
        >
          <XAxis dataKey="date" tickFormatter={formatDateString} />{" "}
          <YAxis domain={["auto", "auto"]} />
          <Tooltip />
          <Legend />
          <Line type="monotone" dataKey="price" stroke="#8884d8" dot={false} />
          <ReferenceLine
            y={chartData[chartData.length - 1]?.price}
            stroke="red"
            strokeDasharray="5 5"
          />
        </LineChart>
